# playgroundDescription

**Instance Property**

A description of the random forest regressor shown in a playground.

## Declaration

```swift
var playgroundDescription: Any { get }
```

## Describing a random forest regressor

- **description**: A text representation of the random forest regressor.
- **debugDescription**: A text representation of the random forest regressor that’s suitable for output during debugging.
